summary: Full backend + frontend testing of DreamWedds render service. All 7 pytest backend tests passed (health, upload, upload validation, render validation, marigold 5s render, midnight 5s render, list). Frontend e2e succeeded: header, template picker toggling, all form testids, schedule add/remove, photo upload thumbnail, 10s render trigger, progress indicator, rendered-video-player, download-video-btn, remove-photo-btn all worked. Video rendered end-to-end via external URL.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py line 102 hardcodes http://localhost:8001 when rewriting photo URLs for render-service. Works since both run in same container but should ideally be an env var (e.g., INTERNAL_BACKEND_URL).
No file-size / count limits enforced server-side beyond 15MB per upload; consider max photos check (frontend already limits to 4).
seed_data_creation: Test uploads and renders created via API; renders persisted in Mongo 'renders' collection.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend tests take ~15-20s total because Remotion bundle is warm. Use durationInSeconds=5 in tests. Render service must be running on :4001 (bundled=true in /api/health). External URL currently handled sync renders in <15s each.
